problem id: 9e2b594d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10010111 -> 00001011
  10011011 -> 00010000
  10000001 -> 00100010
  01000011 -> 10010110
  00010110 -> 00101001
  11001001 -> 10100000
  11110111 -> 11010011
  10001100 -> 00111011
  10101111 -> 01110101

query: 11011000
predicted answer: 10000110
